'''Hayca Mekket''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[veterinarian]] who treated [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] for his terminal illness by injecting him with the bone marrow of [[Jaing Skirata]]. All she asked for payment was a thick, [[red]] quilt and told Fett he shouldn't have anymore children.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
